mapper.select: SELECT ITIV_HDKEY ,EXQTY ,CFQTY ,WKSTATUS FROM TWORK_INFO_ITIV_DT WHERE CTKEY=#{fr_ctkey} AND ITIV_HDKEY=#{itiv_hdkey}

SELECT A.CTKEY, A.OWKEY, A.OBDTKEY, A.ICKEY, A.ICUTKEY, A.TO_ULCKEY AS ULCKEY , CASE SUM(A.CFQTY) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(A.EXQTY) END AS EXQTY , A.UOM, B.PRODUCTDATE, B.EXPIREDATE , B.ATTRIBUTE1, B.ATTRIBUTE2, B.ATTRIBUTE3, B.ATTRIBUTE4, B.ATTRIBUTE5 , C.EXTERNORDERKEY, C.EXTERNORDERLINENUM, C.COSTPRICE , C.ACKEY, C.LOGGRPCD, C.ICGRKEY, C.ICGRTYPE, C.DCKEY, C.STORE_KEY FROM TWORK_INFO_PI_DT A , TWORK_INFO_IVAT B , TWORK_INFO_OB_DT C WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND A.WKSTATUS = #{wkstatus} AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.IVATKEY=B.IVATKEY AND A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND A.OBDTKEY = C.OBDTKEY GROUP BY A.CTKEY, A.OWKEY, A.OBDTKEY, A.ICKEY, A.ICUTKEY, A.TO_ULCKEY, A.UOM , B.PRODUCTDATE, B.EXPIREDATE , B.ATTRIBUTE1, B.ATTRIBUTE2, B.ATTRIBUTE3, B.ATTRIBUTE4, B.ATTRIBUTE5 , C.EXTERNORDERKEY, C.EXTERNORDERLINENUM, C.COSTPRICE , C.ACKEY, C.LOGGRPCD, C.ICGRKEY, C.DCKEY, C.ICGRTYPE, C.STORE_KEY
